description: R/G/R gap: sentinel trials must be excluded from the DSR SCORING loop, not just from moment computation. With corrected moments (SR_0=1.368), a sentinel trial still produces DSR=14.02 vs the best valid trial's DSR=1.014. The loop must skip t.value==sentinel when selecting best_trial_by_dsr.

scoring_scenario.derivation: compute_deflated_sharpe_ratio(SR_obs=1e6, SR_0=1.36773, gamma3=0.44803, gamma4=2.2, T=60) = 14.024. compute_deflated_sharpe_ratio(SR_obs=1.5, SR_0=1.36773, gamma3=0.44803, gamma4=2.2, T=60) = 1.014. Sentinel trial wins ranking despite corrected moments because (1e6 - 1.37) is still enormous.

derivation.gap_description: The DSR scoring loop iterates completed_trials (all t.value not None). Sentinel trials have t.value=1e6. Even with corrected moments, DSR(SR_obs=1e6) >> DSR(SR_obs=1.5), so a sentinel trial wins best_trial_by_dsr. Fix: skip trials with t.value == _SORTINO_SENTINEL in the scoring loop (or use the filtered trial list for scoring).
